content.text:
Based on the visual inspection of the molecule (geomconf_7306.xyz), I can now clearly identify the neighbor atoms of atom index 1 (C:1):

Atom C:1 (carbon with index 1) is covalently connected to:
- C:0 (carbon with index 0) - single bond
- C:3 (carbon with index 3) - single bond  
- O:2 (oxygen with index 2) - double bond (indicated by the red coloring and thicker connection)

The geomconf_index for this molecule is 7306, as shown in the file name "geomconf_7306.xyz".

Therefore, the neighbor atoms of atom index 1 are:
- Atom index 0, element C
- Atom index 3, element C
- Atom index 2, element O

Geomconf_index: 7306

question: Please find the neighbour atoms of the atom with atomic index 1, whose element should be C. Here, neighbour atoms are defined as atoms that are covalently connected to this atom. Report all neighbour atoms by listing their atomic index (as shown in the image) and their element. Also return the geomconf_index for this molecule.
